= [[Organs]] =
== Organ Crafting ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Organ Craft|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Organ Craft|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Organ Craft|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Red Organ Craft|red}}
|}

== Organ Currency ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Genetic Core}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mutant Cell (Organ)}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Mutantigen|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Organ Boost Serum|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Specimen}}
|}

== Organ Slime ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Green Organ Slime|green}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Blue Organ Slime|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Purple Organ Slime|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Orange Organ Slime|orange}}
|}

== Old Organs ==
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Organ Slime}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Organs]]
